selections.name: Yuuki
selections.reason: Excellent second up record and just missed last start at Bendigo. Drawn well and gets a great chance to break maiden here.

selections.name: Scoobartie
selections.reason: Resuming after a solid debut prep. Has trialled well leading into this and maps to get a good run.

selections.name: Hopes 'N' Dreams
selections.reason: First starter by Brave Smash. Won a recent jump-out and stable must be respected on debut.

selections.name: Hydrating
selections.reason: Showed improvement to place third last start at Corowa. Can figure in the finish with further progression.

danger_horse.name: Watch The Fort
danger_horse.reason: Back from a spell and gets the inside draw. Trialled okay and could surprise fresh.

selections.name: Red Light Rachel
selections.reason: Returns from a let-up. Form prior was solid including a close third at Canberra. Top chance in this field.

selections.name: Celtic Light
selections.reason: Drawn the inside and showed ability on debut when third at Geelong. Forgive last start, can bounce back.

selections.name: Kilmer
selections.reason: Resuming. Placed first up previously and has trialled well. Should be prominent.

selections.name: In Our Hearts
selections.reason: Fitter for first up run. Drawn well and capable of sharp improvement second up.

danger_horse.name: Apple Eyes
danger_horse.reason: Resuming. Showed glimpses last prep and has trialled well enough to be considered a threat.

selections.name: Cheers To Us
selections.reason: Strong effort last start when narrowly beaten at this track and distance. Looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Coniston Spice
selections.reason: Not far away in two starts to date. Capable of a strong showing with natural improvement.

selections.name: Baie De Seine
selections.reason: First starter with numerous trials under the belt. Tricky draw but stable is astute.

selections.name: Sakura Jenni (NZ)
selections.reason: Debutant who won her most recent trial. Forward enough to run a race here.

danger_horse.name: Bon Aurelia
danger_horse.reason: Third up and drawn well. Can improve off recent wet track runs.

selections.name: My Rosalie
selections.reason: Massive class drop from LR company at Caulfield. Was a close second at Ararat prior. Standout.

selections.name: Celtic Park (NZ)
selections.reason: Solid debut effort when 5th at Warracknabeal. Will appreciate the step up in trip and gets the inside draw.

selections.name: He's On Song
selections.reason: Consistent form including a close second at Mt Gambier two starts back. Definite chance.

selections.name: Soul Glow
selections.reason: Fitter for recent racing and drawn well. Can figure in the minor placings.

danger_horse.name: Tulchan
danger_horse.reason: Second up. Needed the run fresh and can show improvement over this distance.

selections.name: Flashlight (NZ)
selections.reason: Won at this track and trip last start. Drawn perfectly to repeat the dose.

selections.name: Donegal Soul
selections.reason: Just missed behind Flashlight last start. Gets a weight swing and is the clear danger.

selections.name: Prince Pinot
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after winning at Echuca and Kilmore. Must be respected despite weight.

selections.name: Gift Of Oratory
selections.reason: Faded last start but form prior was solid. Can bounce back into the placings.

danger_horse.name: Final Quarter
danger_horse.reason: Runner-up at this track two starts back. Capable on her day.

selections.name: Come Along Jeffrey
selections.reason: Strong second up run when narrowly beaten at Kilmore. Ready to peak third up.

selections.name: No Overtaking
selections.reason: Impressive winner at Kerang last start. Can go on with it here.

selections.name: Where's My Sock
selections.reason: Knocking on the door after two close seconds. Drawn the inside and gets his chance.

selections.name: Chosen Venture
selections.reason: Consistent type who was runner-up at this track last start. Right in this.

danger_horse.name: Solar Mist
danger_horse.reason: Narrowly beaten at Warracknabeal last start. Warrants respect.

selections.name: Mr Butt's Boats
selections.reason: Second up. Excellent third fresh at Kilmore. Fitter now and looks a top winning chance despite wide draw.

selections.name: Monix
selections.reason: Drawn the inside and comes off a solid third at Seymour. Deserves respect.

selections.name: Got Out The Fence
selections.reason: Consistent performer who placed at Warracknabeal last start. Genuine hope.

selections.name: Olivia's Scandal
selections.reason: Placed at this track last start. Favourable barrier enhances her prospects.

danger_horse.name: Turn Up The Night (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Capable of better than recent runs suggest. Can feature on his best form.

selections.name: Antisocial
selections.reason: Impressive winner at Kyneton last start. Drawn perfectly to make it back-to-back wins.

selections.name: Reward The Sheriff
selections.reason: Won at this track and distance last start. Big chance to repeat the dose.

selections.name: Maximillius
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten by Reward The Sheriff here last start. Meets him better at the weights.

selections.name: Lychee Green Tea
selections.reason: Forgive last start. Placed at Avoca prior and can bounce back.

danger_horse.name: The Wayfarer
danger_horse.reason: Drawn the inside and wasn't far away here last start. Can sneak into the placings.
